action_set_definitions.name: get_observatory_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current telemetry and operational state of the observatory, including system time, weather safety flag, telescope status, and hardware configuration.

action_set_definitions.name: wait_for_time
action_set_definitions.description: Pauses the agent's execution until the observatory's internal clock reaches the specified UTC timestamp.

target_time.description: The ISO 8601 UTC timestamp to wait for (e.g., '2023-10-27T02:00:00Z').

action_set_definitions.name: set_optical_filter
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the filter wheel to rotate to the specified optical filter.

action_set_definitions.name: slew_to_target
action_set_definitions.description: Points the telescope mount at the specified celestial coordinates.

ra.description: Right Ascension in 'HHh MMm SSs' format.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_dome_shutter
action_set_definitions.description: Operates the physical dome shutter mechanism of the observatory.

action.description: Desired state for the dome shutter.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_exposure
action_set_definitions.description: Activates the camera sensor to capture a science-grade image for the specified duration.

duration_seconds.description: The duration of the exposure in seconds.

action_set_definitions.name: park_telescope
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the telescope mount to its designated safe storage (PARKED) position.

state_description.system_time_utc: The current simulation time in ISO 8601 format.
state_description.mount_azimuth: Current horizontal angle of the telescope in degrees (0-360).
state_description.mount_altitude: Current vertical angle of the telescope in degrees (0-90).
state_description.telescope_status: Current operational mode: IDLE, SLEWING, TRACKING, OBSERVING, or PARKED.
state_description.filter_position: The currently loaded optical filter (e.g., U, B, V, R, I).
state_description.dome_shutter_status: The physical state of the observatory dome: OPEN or CLOSED.
state_description.weather_safety_ok: Internal flag indicating if wind/humidity/rain levels are safe for operation.
state_description.remaining_power_pct: Current battery or system power percentage.
